calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-14-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Apr-03-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: April 3, 2008

This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Karen Farnsworth, #5162.

Douglas Holloway, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bank of the West.
No appearance by Shamsher Singh, individually and dba PVS Transport.
Default entered against defendant on January 30, 2008.
Order waiving appearance of witness at default prove-up hearing issued on March 5, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff Bank of the West, and against the Defaulted Defendant SHAMSHER SINGH, individually and dba PVS TRANSPORT as follows:

Immediate possession of the leased equipment described as one 2003 Hyundai Dryvan, VIN# 3H3V532C63T134005 and one 2006 Utility Reefer 53'X102', VIN# IUYVS25316U619403, which equipment collectively has a fair market value of $48,000.00.

In the event plaintiff Bank of the West cannot recover the aforesaid personal property, plaintiff Bank of the West shall be entitled to a judgment against defendant SHAMSHER SINGH, individually and dba PVS TRANSPORT, in the amount of $48,000.00, representing the value of said property.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Feb-07-2008 Continued To Apr-03-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
